final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Loan Management System",
  "business_summary": "Manage loan applications and disbursements.",
  "actors": ["admin", "customer", "lender"],
  "functional_requirements": ["user registration", "loan application", "approval process", "disbursement", "repayment tracking"],
  "non_functional_requirements": ["high availability", "data security", "scalability", "user-friendly interface", "audit trails"],
  "technology_stack": {
    "frontend": "React",
    "backend": "Node.js",
    "database": "PostgreSQL",
    "cloud": "AWS"
  },
  "architecture_pattern": "microservices",
  "modules": ["auth", "loan", "payment", "notification", "reporting"],
  "entities": ["user", "loan", "payment", "notification", "report"],
  "database_design": ["user table", "loan table", "payment table", "notification table", "report table"],
  "apis": ["auth API", "loan API", "payment API", "notification API", "report API"],
  "integrations": ["payment gateway", "email service", "SMS service", "credit check API", "third-party lenders"],
  "security": {
    "authentication": "JWT",
    "authorization": "RBAC",
    "data_protection": "encryption"
  },
  "developer_handoff": ["code review", "unit tests", "documentation"],
  "qa_handoff": ["test cases", "test environment", "bug tracking"],
  "deployment_handoff": ["CI/CD pipeline", "monitoring setup", "rollback plan"]
}
